segments.text: Healthy snack brands fail a lot, but you know, design can change that. Here is how this brand won with three smart choices. First, healthy food can feel boring, but New Deli makes it feel good.
They use fun lines on the box like feel good energy, not no guilt. That is smart. It actually makes you feel happy,
not like you're on a diet. But colors matter, too. And most healthy brands use boring colors. New Deli use bright yellow, green, and red. All of them are
bold and fun. Young people love it, and parents trust it. But you know the real smart part, see the squirrel's open mouth. You see the nuts inside. That's
honest. It gives you the confidence when you're buying some premium food. And also when you line up all the boxes, they just look so beautiful together.
And people will think of keeping them all.
